title: 150g x 1 | Colgate Advanced Whitening 100ml Each
description: Product Description Colgate Advanced Whitening 100ml Ingredients Aqua hydrated silica sorbitol glycerin sodium bicarbonate PEG-12 aromas sodium lauryl sulfate carrageenan CI 77891 sodium fluoride sodium saccharin polyethylene limonene CI 42090 Directions 1. Start with the outer surfaces of your teeth. Take your time to maintain your upper row of teeth and then your lower row of teeth. Do with the inner surfaces of your teeth. 2. Angle a toothbrush at a 45 degree angle. Brush along the edge of the tooth. 3. Brush your tongue. 4. Use mouthwash. 5. Remember to replace your toothbrushes every 3 months to ensure effective oral hygiene. Safety Warning For external use. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. If irritated, discontinue use and consult the dentist. Manufacturer Contact Information Colgate Advanced Whitening 100ml See more
